name: Central Khon Kaen / downtown retail-hotel core
capture_notes: Primary city retail and hotel core near Friendship Highway, rail station, restaurants, offices, and nightlife. Good for urban destination DC charging if access and parking are strong.

name: Route 2 Friendship Highway city core
capture_notes: Highest current seed AADT point is Route 2 Khon Kaen - Hin Lat at 53,895 AADT. Strong for mixed city/intercity charging.

name: Khon Kaen University / Srinagarind Hospital / Srichan axis
capture_notes: University, hospital, government, office, and residential demand. Good for daytime and repeat urban charging; site access matters more than highway visibility.

name: Western Ring Road / Route 230 / airport-bypass access
capture_notes: Route 230 west ring road has 26,174 AADT in 2566 and connects airport/bypass movements. Better for roadside hub format than deep destination parking.

name: Route 12 west gateway / Ban Fang - Khon Kaen
capture_notes: Route 12 west of city has 40,107 AADT in current seed data. Important east-west corridor toward Chum Phae/Phetchabun.

name: Route 2 south gateway / Ban Phai - Tha Phra
capture_notes: Route 2 south approach shows 29,032 AADT and links Bangkok/Korat-Ban Phai-Khon Kaen flow. Good for intercity stopover if paired with strong roadside amenities.

name: Kaen Nakhon Lake / Ton Tann lifestyle zone
capture_notes: Lifestyle, evening food, recreation, hotel, and residential demand. More destination-oriented; likely lower turnover than highway hubs.
